evidence: "One of the best sci-fi films of all time."
"This movie has no character development but instead it puts you in the astronaut's shoes..."
"You can watch it once and forget about it but I think the director did not mean it to be taken in the literal way."
"Rented this from Redbox and did not pause the movie at all. This was an excellent movie, well paced..."
"Switch the logical part of your brain off and enjoy this unrealistic, fantastic action movie..."
"The bluray quality is very good with excellent picture and sound."
"Every time I watch it, you can see the level of perfection they put into this movie."
"I feel sorry for those who missed out on the theater experience of BR2049."
"I am so glad to be born and living in the era of Pixar and their wonderful work..."
"For me, this is the movie of the decade... it is a feast for your senses..."
"I have surround sound headphones so the experience was exhilarating."
"The 'home' scene always brings tears to my eyes."
"This movie was designed for the theaters... a work of art."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi, action, and thrillers, often appreciating high production quality and sensory experiences. They enjoy fast-paced narratives that evoke strong emotional responses, while showing mixed feelings towards narrative complexity and brand loyalty.
